reader.name: Your Name
reader.profile: a brief description of who you are and your goals — e.g. 'a product manager in consumer tech with 5 years experience. Goals: stay current on AI/product trends, find actionable insights.' This is injected into every digest prompt to personalize the output.
reader.background: your domain expertise and industry — e.g. 'product management, consumer apps, growth, monetization'. Used to tailor the actionable suggestions section.
